sessionStart.bash: if [ -f ~/.vscode-worktree-setup ]; then nohup bash -c 'npm ci && npm run compile' > /tmp/worktree-setup-$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S).log 2>&1 & fi
sessionStart.powershell: if (Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.vscode-worktree-setup") { $log = "$env:TEMP\worktree-setup-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss').log"; $dir = $PWD.Path; Start-Job -ScriptBlock { param($d, $l) Set-Location $d; & { npm ci; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { npm run compile } } *> $l } -ArgumentList $dir, $log | Out-Null }
